title: Accordion
description: Two tiers — pass-through compound parts (Accordion / AccordionItem / AccordionTrigger / AccordionContent) for full control, or SmartAccordion for the canonical icon + title + optional badge + body admin pattern.

title: Badge
description: Status pills and chips for tags, counts, and inline state.

title: Buttons
description: The base button family — BaseButton (variant × style × size), the higher-level Button (loader / tooltip / link wrapper), and specialty buttons (Google, Shopify, Text, PageAction).

title: Cards (SmartCard)
description: The composed card primitive — header (icon, title, suffix, slots), optional alert, expandable body, footer text or slot, and three surface chromes.

title: Combobox
description: EnhancedCombobox and EnhancedComboboxMultiple — searchable, optionally grouped, with apply / close-on-select behaviours, async fetchers, custom rendering, and form integration.

title: Copyable
description: Click-to-copy inline span with hover affordance and toast feedback.

title: Currency
description: MoneyDisplay and CurrencyPairPreview — locale-aware, dual-pricing-aware money rendering driven by useCurrency() / UIProvider config.

title: Date pickers
description: DatePicker (single / range / multiple) and MonthYearPicker — popover-based, locale-aware, with optional year dropdown and time input.

title: Display
description: The display layer — Avatar, IconBadge, InlineStat, Tooltip, Separator, NotificationBanner, BooleanIndicator, ShowIf, ThrottleAlert, VisuallyHidden, PlaceholderPattern.

title: Empty state
description: Adaptive zero-data surface. Wrap with the right illustration per resource — products, users, search results, inbox. Slots for media / actions / footer; consumer overrides every string.

title: Event calendar
description: Month view with categories, filtering, navigation rules, custom event rendering, and three day-heading variants.

title: Forms
description: The full form scope — FormField wrapper plus every field component exported from base/forms/fields: text inputs, numeric, selects, toggles, choice groups, date/time, repeaters, localized fields, and uploads.

title: Item
description: Canonical row primitive — icon/avatar/image media, title + description content, optional actions. Use ItemGroup to compose lists.

title: Map
description: Leaflet-backed map primitives — Map shell, MapTileLayer, MapMarker, MapPopup. Always wrap in a fixed-height container.

title: Metadata list
description: Flexible label/value list for entity metadata. Three layouts (vertical grid, horizontal pills, two-column rows), per-item icons, tooltips, descriptions, and custom renderers — with first-class empty-state handling.

title: Navigation
description: The navigation primitives — PageHeader, Breadcrumbs, ActionMenu, LanguageSwitcher, SectionNav, SideNav, AsideNavigationMenu, TabNavigationMenu, NavigationTabs, OverflowTabBar.

title: Spinner
description: Loading indicator with three visual variants. Pairs with content placeholders, route transitions, and Suspense fallbacks.

title: Table
description: DataTable + Pagination — TanStack-React-Table-backed, with sorting, row actions, sticky header, three sizes, and three surface chromes.

title: Typography
description: Heading, Text, Label, and TextLink — the four typography primitives every higher layer composes from.

title: Upload tray
description: Drag-drop area + per-file progress rows + summary toolbar. Composes Dropzone and UploadProgressList. Framework-agnostic — the consumer drives the actual transfer.

title: Common · Brand
description: Logo + AppLogo (sized variants). Source images expected at /assets/media/gct-logo[-light].png.

title: Composed · Admin
description: Team list, permissions, conversations, settings, inventory.

title: Composed · AI
description: Summary block + classification panel.

title: Composed · AI (elements)
description: Standalone surfaces ported from elements.ai-sdk.dev: shimmer, code-block, agent, package-info, reasoning, chain-of-thought, sources, inline-citation, task, artifact, file-tree, confirmation, attachment.

title: Composed · AI (extras)
description: Confidence dial, prompt suggestions, token usage card, message bubble, tool call, citation, feedback.

title: Composed · Admin · API key list
description: Collapsible section with per-row dropdown menu (Copy / Delete) and an optional Add action in the header. Generic enough for any 'named secret list' — service tokens, webhook URLs, deployment hooks. Composes base/cards + base/display/collapsible + base/navigation/ActionMenu + base/copyable.

title: Composed · Commerce
description: Bookings, loyalty, discount stacks, shipment tracking.

title: Composed · Commerce (extras)
description: Cart, coupon, order status, payment, tax breakdown, subscription, refund, address, voucher.

title: Composed · Contact card
description: ContactCard — name, role, email, phone, location, badge.

title: Composed · Course card
description: Group experience with participants & progress.

title: Composed · Dark surfaces
description: Dark-wrapped components — payment, receipt, info panel, order items, outstanding balance.

title: Composed · Dense info cards
description: Five layout variants — dashboard, classification, financial, project, score.

title: Composed · Feature announcement
description: Highlight a new feature with tags and an action.

title: Composed · Giftcard cards
description: Five visual variants — gradient, compact, minimal, dark, illustrated.

title: Composed · Gradient card
description: Vivid gradient card with optional pattern, badge, alert, action.

title: Composed · Invoice header
description: Top of an invoice — number, status, parties, amount.

title: Composed · Invoice items
description: Table, compact, detailed layouts with subtotal/tax/discount/total.

title: Composed · Invoice mini
description: Compact invoice tile — paid / pending / overdue.

title: Composed · Invoice table
description: Line items with qty / price / total.

title: Composed · Navigation & boards
description: Kanban, tab switcher, time ruler, vendor performance, experience activity.

title: Composed · Navigation (extras)
description: BreadcrumbProgress wizard + CategoryNavCard sidebar.

title: Composed · Onboarding · Checklist
description: Step-list accordion with completed / in-progress / pending status indicators. Auto-opens the next non-completed step. Strings + status ARIA fully overridable. Composes base/accordion.

title: Composed · Timelines
description: Read-only tracking timelines — steps, order, payment, activity stream, release changelog, project milestones. For interactive activity (segments, mass-config, resource registry, callbacks) see Features → Activity feed.

title: Composed · Vendor profile
description: VendorProfileCard with metrics, stats and actions.

title: Features · Activity feed
description: Interactive activity feed — generic, framework-agnostic, with headline segments, callbacks (actor / resource / action), strings, slots, mass event configuration, and a save/restore resource registry. For read-only tracking timelines (order, payment, changelog, milestones) see Composed → Timelines.

title: AI Chat
description: Framework-agnostic AI chat surface. Ties together prompt input, conversation, message renderer, queue, and the full composed/ai/* palette (reasoning, tool calls, attachments, artifacts, confirmations).

title: Features · Comments
description: Generic, framework-agnostic comments with rich-text composer (TipTap-backed), inline resource references (mentions, links, badges), attachment uploads with progress, and reactions. Every callback / registry flows as a direct prop — no provider.

title: Features · Event log
description: Unified, mentions-aware mixed-source log: comments + audit events + system messages + custom kinds under one chronological surface. Inline `@user` / `#booking` / `$order` triggers work in the composer; resource chips render with tone-driven Badge variants in every entry kind.

title: Filters
description: Composable filter system. Search + multi-select stay always visible; the rest collapse behind a Filters button. Provider-driven so it works with any data source.

title: GlobalSearch
description: Async search palette with slots, render-props, and a headless useGlobalSearch hook.

title: Features · Kanban
description: Drag-and-drop board, generic in T. Pass `itemActions` (static array or per-item factory) for the ⋮ menu, `onItemClick` for whole-card click. Headless via `useKanban`; slots: KanbanBoard / KanbanColumn / KanbanColumnContent / KanbanItem / KanbanItemHandle / KanbanItemActions / KanbanOverlay.

title: Features · Metrics · Analytics bar
description: `MetricBar` — horizontal KPI strip with hairline-divided cells. Pair with `MetricGrid` for card-style layouts.

title: Features · Metrics · Analytics cards
description: `MetricGradient` — vivid gradient hero card with embedded area chart. Pick a `theme` to drive the colour palette.

title: Features · Metrics · Comparison
description: `MetricComparison` — side-by-side current vs previous with a tone-tinted delta box. Reuses the unified `MetricData` shape so currency/percent formatting carries through.

title: Features · Metrics · Activity heatmap
description: `ActivityHeatmap` — GitHub-style daily-activity calendar with success-tinted intensity cells.

title: Features · Metrics · Inline badge
description: `InlineMetricBadge` — compact `label · value · change%` pill rows. Use as in-flow copy where a full Metric tile is too heavy.

title: Features · Metrics · KPI row
description: `MiniKpiRow` — compact horizontal divider-separated KPI strip for header / footer accents.

title: Features · Metrics · Micro chart grid
description: `MetricMicroGrid` — six-cell dense overview pairing each KPI with a different lightweight visualization (bars / line / dots / progress / area / pie).

title: Features · Metrics · Overview
description: The unified metrics module: a single Metric component with seven layout variants, plus MetricBar, MetricGrid, and supporting atoms (TrendChip, Sparkline, Skeleton). One MetricData shape powers every surface — see the dedicated pages for each layout.

title: Features · Metrics · Stat cards
description: Two stat tile flavors built from the unified `Metric` component — `accent` (dark surface + sparkline) and `colored` (segmented progress bar).

title: Features · Rich text editor
description: Tiptap-backed editor with bold / italic / strike / lists / quote / undo-redo. Falls back to a non-editable preview when @tiptap/react is not bundled. Strings overridable via the `strings` prop.

title: Layout · Containers
description: Container and Section primitives for page structure, width clamps, padding density, and semantic wrappers.

title: Layout · Header
description: Topbar, breadcrumbs, command search, notifications, and action slots in a realistic app-shell canvas.

title: Layout · Page
description: Page shell, header partials, actions, and content regions with framework-neutral links.

title: Layout · Sidebar
description: Full app sidebar assembly plus reusable navigation, workspace, and footer item partials.

title: Layout · Users & avatars
description: User identity surfaces used by layout headers, sidebars, menus, avatar groups, and status badges.

title: UI · Alert
description: shadcn alert primitive: variants, with title/description/action.

title: UI · Avatar
description: Avatar with fallback, image, sizes, group, badge.

title: UI · Breadcrumb
description: shadcn breadcrumb — list, items, separator (default & custom).

title: UI · Button
description: shadcn primitive button — variants, sizes, button group.

title: UI · Calendar
description: react-day-picker styled with shadcn primitives.

title: UI · Collapsible
description: Headless show/hide region.

title: UI · Empty + Item
description: Empty state and Item list-row primitives.

title: UI · Input group
description: Input with leading / trailing add-ons.

title: UI · Inputs
description: Input, Textarea, Select primitives.

title: UI · Menus
description: DropdownMenu, ContextMenu, Command palette.

title: UI · Overlays
description: Dialog, Sheet, Popover, Tooltip, HoverCard.

title: UI · Pagination
description: Manual composition of pagination controls.

title: UI · Progress
description: Linear progress bar at varying values.

title: UI · Scroll area
description: Custom-styled scroll viewport.

title: UI · Separator
description: Horizontal & vertical dividers.

title: UI · Skeleton
description: Animated loading placeholders.

title: UI · Sonner toaster
description: Toast notifications.

title: UI · Spinner
description: Loading spinner — sized via className.

title: UI · Tabs
description: Tab list with content panels.

title: UI · Toggles
description: Checkbox, Switch, RadioGroup, Slider primitives.

title: UI · Toggle + ToggleGroup
description: Single toggle + radio/multiple group.

title: UI · Badge
description: shadcn badge primitive (no theming wrapper).

title: UI · Card
description: shadcn primitive card with header / title / description / content / footer.

title: UI · Table
description: shadcn table primitive (no data layer).
